title: Slack automations having the flexibility to adapt dynamically based on the user.
excerpt: Slack automations currently require specific users to be notified, which limits adaptability. This lack of flexibility prevents users from making real-time changes based on evolving needs or contexts. For instance, when …

posts.author: Wayne_loh (Wayne Loh)
posts.cookedHtml: Slack automations currently require specific users to be notified, which limits adaptability. This lack of flexibility prevents users from making real-time changes based on evolving needs or contexts. For instance, when integrating Slack with monday.com, an HR manager might assign a task notification to a specific team member. However, if priorities shift or the assigned person becomes unavailable, the automation cannot seamlessly redirect the notification to another team member.
